_simulated.subject: Technical Support — David Chen VPN Configuration
_simulated.transcript:
Agent Lisa Park: Hi David, thanks for reaching out via Teams. I see you're having issues with VPN connectivity?

David Chen: Yes, ever since the last update my VPN client keeps disconnecting every 10 to 15 minutes. I'm working remotely and it's really impacting my productivity.

Agent Lisa Park: I understand how frustrating that must be. Let me check a few things. Are you running the latest version of the VPN client, version 4.2.1?

David Chen: I think so. Let me check... it says version 4.2.0.

Agent Lisa Park: There's the issue. Version 4.2.0 has a known bug with keep-alive packets on certain network configurations. We pushed a patch in 4.2.1 last week. Let me walk you through the update.

David Chen: Okay, I'm ready.

Agent Lisa Park: First, open your system tray and right-click the VPN icon. Select 'Check for Updates'. It should find version 4.2.1. Go ahead and install it — it won't interrupt your current connection.

David Chen: Updating now... it's downloading. Okay, it's asking me to restart the client.

Agent Lisa Park: Go ahead and restart it. I'll wait.

David Chen: Done. It says version 4.2.1 now. Should I test the connection?

Agent Lisa Park: Yes, connect to the corporate VPN and let's wait a few minutes to see if the disconnection issue persists.

David Chen: Connected. It's been about 5 minutes now and it's holding steady. Before it would have dropped by now.

Agent Lisa Park: Excellent! The update should resolve the keep-alive issue permanently. If you experience any more disconnections, please reach out again and we'll investigate further. I'm also going to create a ticket so we can track this.

David Chen: Great, thank you Lisa. That was much easier than I expected.

Agent Lisa Park: Happy to help! Have a great rest of your day.
_simulated.summary: VPN disconnection issue resolved by updating client from v4.2.0 to v4.2.1 which fixed a known keep-alive packet bug. Customer confirmed stable connection after update.
